/admin/content/files.reason: Risky. No enabled route responds right now, but a DISABLED view files:page_1 (views.view.files) declares this exact path; enabling it would collide. Also an /admin/... namespace is inappropriate for a content node alias. Avoid.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Risky. No enabled route responds right now, but a DISABLED view scheduler_scheduled_media:overview (views.view.scheduler_scheduled_media) declares this exact path; enabling it (Scheduler media integration) would collide. Also an /admin/... namespace is inappropriate for a content node alias. Avoid.

/blog.reason: Claimed. It is an existing URL alias (internal /page/2) and the canonical page of canvas_page entity 2 ("Blog", route entity.canvas_page.canonical). A new node alias here would collide with / shadow that page.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed. content_moderation IS enabled, but its moderated-content listing route (content_moderation.admin_moderated_content) lives at /admin/content/moderated, NOT at /moderated-content. The live router returns NO ROUTE for /moderated-content and no alias exists. Safe.

/search.reason: Claimed by a Views page display: search:page (route view.search.page, config views.view.search), a computed search listing over search_api_index_content. A node alias here would shadow and hijack the view.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed. site-architecture:path-owner reports claimed=false; live router returns NO ROUTE and the path_alias manager returns the path unchanged (no alias). No route, view, or entity responds. Safe to use as a new node URL alias.
